data.title: Currax Expands Patient Access to FDA-Approved Obesity Treatment with PeekDirect™
data.description: Peek, a company based in Brentwood, Tennessee, has announced the availability of Contrave, which is considered the top branded oral weight loss medication that is not a GLP-1. As of April 1, 2026, self-funded employers can now access Contrave through Peek. Currax Pharmaceuticals LLC, a specialty pharmaceutical company and the maker of Contrave, is responsible for providing this medication, which is ranked first in its category.

data.title: REalloys (NASDAQ: ALOY) Secures Strategic Alliance and Offtake Commitment from America’s Highest-Grade Rare-Earth Deposit
data.description: REalloys has successfully formed a strategic partnership and secured an offtake commitment from the leading rare-earth deposit in America. This alliance will pave the way for the company to capitalize on the deposit's high-grade quality.
NBT Bancorp Inc. sets date for first quarter conference call to discuss financial results.

data.title: Alteryx Expands Regional Leadership with Sabya Sen to Lead IMEA & APAC
data.description: Alteryx, Inc., a top AI-ready data and analytics company, has appointed Sabya Sen as Vice President for IMEA & APAC regions. The move is part of a strategic decision as the Middle East and APAC regions are becoming significant global hubs for AI innovation and enterprise investment. The announcement was made in Irvine, Calif., on April 1, 2026. This reflects the company's recognition of the growing importance of these regions, highlighting the increasing focus on AI development and business opportunities in these areas. The appointment signifies Alteryx's commitment to expanding its presence and operations in these fast-growing markets.

data.title: J-Star Holding Announces Return of Jonathan Chiang as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Taichung City, Taiwan, on April 1, 2026, J-Star Holding Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: YMAT) shared that Jonathan Chiang has been reinstated as Chief Executive Officer, taking over from Sam Van. J-Star is a key player in providing cutting-edge carbon fiber and composite solutions for various sectors such as personal sports gear, healthcare items, automotive components, resin systems, and R&D services. The transition occurred on March 31, 2026. Sam Van will stay involved with the company in an advisory role for the Board and management.

data.title: Shutterstock Launches Licensed Content App in ChatGPT, Bringing Commercial-Ready Assets into AI-Native Workflows
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Shutterstock, Inc. introduced its Shutterstock app on ChatGPT. The company, listed on NYSE as SSTK, focuses on providing creative and GenAI solutions to assist users in enhancing their work. This new launch allows customers to explore a wide range of images, videos, and music within the convenience of the ChatGPT platform.

data.title: MicroAlgo Announces Substantial Increase of 143.5% in Net Profit for 2025
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on April 1, 2026, MicroAlgo Inc. (NASDAQ: MLGO) revealed its financial outcomes for the year finishing on December 31, 2025. The Company, known for creating custom central processing algorithms, shared its key financial achievements for 2025.

data.title: Almond Heights Receives Deficiency-Free Annual State Survey
data.description: Almond Heights, located in Orangevale, California, a well-known assisted living and memory care facility managed by MBK Senior Living, has been officially acknowledged by the state for its dedication to providing outstanding care, maintaining a safe environment, and demonstrating operational proficiency. This recognition underscores the community's commitment to excellence in senior living. This accolade was announced on April 1, 2026, in Irvine, California.

data.title: Anixa Biosciences Advances Breast Cancer Vaccine Toward Phase 2 After Positive Phase 1 Results; Cytovance Selected for cGMP Manufacturing
data.description: San Jose, California - On April 1, 2026, Anixa Biosciences, Inc. announced that their Phase 1 study successfully achieved primary endpoints, demonstrating safety and tolerability at the maximum tolerated dose. The study also indicated protocol-defined immune responses in 74% of participants. Anixa, listed as ANIX on NASDAQ, is the company behind this promising development.

data.title: Bitcoin Climbs To $68,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Advance On Improved Sentiment
data.description: Bitcoin surged to $68,000, driven by positive market sentiment and growing institutional interest, with liquidations reaching $327.67 million in the last 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs experienced $117.3 million in net inflows, while Ethereum ETFs saw $31.2 million in net inflows on Tuesday. Current cryptocurrency prices include Bitcoin at $68,404.09, Ethereum at $2,128.08, Solana at $83.20, XRP at $1.34, Dogecoin at $0.09218, and Shiba Inu at $0.05972. Meme coin market capitalization remained stable, recording a 0.7% increase to $33.2 billion in the past day. CoinGlass data provides insights on Bitcoin trends.

data.title: Samsung Biologics Under CEO John Rim Faces New ESG Risk After Rejecting Ruling in Contract Worker Discrimination Case
data.description: In South Korea, Samsung Biologics has filed an appeal against a labor ruling related to discrimination against contract workers regarding holiday gifts. This case has sparked concerns regarding human rights and ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) issues. The appeal highlights the significance of addressing the welfare of contract workers, as they play a crucial role in the workforce. Samsung Biologics' actions bring attention to potential violations and the need to ensure fair treatment for all workers. Such concerns are crucial in safeguarding the rights and conditions of employees in businesses.

data.title: OneMedNet, Onco-Innovations and Inka Health Announces Collaboration Aimed to Accelerate Potential for Oncology Drug Development Using Real-World Data and AI
data.description: OneMedNet, Onco-Innovations, and Inka Health have teamed up in a partnership to fast-track the progress of oncology drug development using real-world data. This collaboration brings together expertise from the three companies to enhance research initiatives in the field. By leveraging real-world data, the collaboration aims to expedite the potential for advancing oncology treatments. The collaboration is expected to significantly impact the industry by facilitating faster and more effective drug development processes.

data.title: Arhaus Announces Evolution of Trade Program to Deepen Engagement with Interior Design Community
data.description: A company has announced a new strategic growth initiative focusing on the professional interior design channel. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to expand its market presence and cater to the growing demand in the interior design sector. The initiative aims to capitalize on the increasing number of professionals in the industry, with a particular focus on reaching out to interior designers, architects, and other key players. By targeting this channel, the company hopes to increase its market share and tap into a lucrative segment that is currently experiencing significant growth. The company's investment in this initiative underscores its commitment to driving growth and establishing a strong foothold in the professional interior design market.

data.title: Adversa AI Wins "Most Innovative Agentic AI Security" Platform at Global InfoSec Awards During RSA Conference 2026
data.description: Adversa AI has been honored for its accomplishments in Continuous AI Red Teaming and Agentic AI security. The company was recognized among numerous vendors and awarded "Most Innovative Agentic AI Security" at the Global InfoSec Awards held during the RSA Conference in San Francisco on April 1, 2026. This prestigious award highlights Adversa AI's leadership and expertise in the field, distinguishing them from their competitors.

data.title: Cornerstone Advisors, National Bankers Association Partner to Support Mission-Driven Banks
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Cornerstone Advisors, a prominent business and technology consulting services provider for banks, credit unions, and fintech firms, revealed a new strategic alliance with the National Bankers Association (NBA). This partnership marks a significant collaboration between the two entities, combining Cornerstone Advisors' expertise and the NBA's resources to enhance services in the financial sector.
